name: Montage Gold Corp.
description: Montage Gold Corp. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on unlocking the potential of its flagship Koné Gold Project in Côte d'Ivoire. Led by a management team with an extensive track record in African mining, the company is dedicated to becoming a premier African gold producer. Montage Gold leverages its expertise in exploration and project development to advance its high-quality assets, aiming to deliver significant value through sustainable mining practices and long-term production growth, starting with the development of the Koné project.
